What difference, to competition,

would have a proportionately lower
rate of say q or 80 cents? Would

Mr., Schiller hints at secret rebates.


1t was not a secret rebate which
the Spokane jobbers asked for, or

miles of the jobbing center--a reduc-

tionate rates for that distance, as
compared with the distributing rates
given the coast jobbers.
